implementation_summary.summary: CP00-682 continues the RP22 External Integrations I P06 permission-decision foundation over 150 planned units from RP22.P06.M00.S07 through RP22.P06.M07.S06. It covers scope inventory, contract draft, type/shape, primary and secondary implementation, permission/audit, synthetic fixture, and test/golden decision-binding rows while keeping runtime paths closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-682 RP22.P06.M00.S07-RP22.P06.M07.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
